summary: Completed comprehensive testing of user management system. Backend APIs 100% functional. Frontend registration/login working with minor UX improvement needed for modal navigation.

minor_issues.issue: Both 'Get Started' and 'Sign In' buttons open login modal initially - users must click 'Sign up' link to access registration form
minor_issues.impact: UX confusion - 'Get Started' should open registration modal directly

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register - Creates users successfully with JWT token response
POST /api/auth/login - Authenticates users and returns valid JWT tokens
GET /api/auth/me - Returns current user profile with valid authentication
GET /api/users - Returns paginated list of 7 registered users
API pagination working with page/per_page parameters
API search functionality working with search parameter
Frontend navbar displays Sign In and Get Started buttons
AuthModal opens and displays login form
Multi-step registration form (3 steps) fully functional via 'Sign up' link
Registration Step 1: username, email, password, confirm password fields
Registration Step 2: role, expertise level, company, years experience, country fields
Registration Step 3: specializations, project types, bio, consent checkbox
Users section displays 'Connect with 7+ professionals worldwide'
Role filter dropdown working - filters to contractors correctly
User cards display properly with avatars, names, roles, companies, countries
User cards show specializations, experience levels, and connect buttons
Search functionality working in users section
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider updating Navbar component to open registration modal directly when 'Get Started' button is clicked (set initialMode='register')
